sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20865" key="braxume/reia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρᾰχῠ-μέρεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n20865.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">aggregate of small elements</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεφελοειδής</foreign>, the 'Milky Way', <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1383.tlg001:5:68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.68</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
